translations.Manage your household: shared checklists: Manage your household: shared checklists, photo boards, and notes.
translations.Pantry helps households stay organized i:
Pantry helps households stay organised in Nextcloud.

- **Houses** group members and their shared data. A person can belong to multiple houses and switch between them freely.
- **Checklists** support recurring items (e.g. milk every week) that automatically reappear when due. Share lists with the whole household so everyone knows what to pick up.
- **Photo boards** let you keep shared reference photos organised in folders — the right brand of dog food, a favourite recipe card, a product label, and so on.
- **Notes wall** gives the household a lightweight shared space for reminders, pinned messages, and quick notes with customisable colours.
- **Notifications** keep everyone in the loop when photos are uploaded, or notes are added or edited.

All data is scoped to a house; members only see the houses they belong to.

**Mobile apps:** [Android (Google Play)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=dev.casraf.pantry) | [iOS (App Store)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pantry-for-nextcloud/id6762161619)
translations.Pantry is a household organizer. Open th: Pantry is a household organiser. Open the Pantry app from the top navigation to manage your houses, checklists, photos and notes.
translations.Pick the base folder where Pantry will s: Pick the base folder where Pantry will store uploaded images. Checklist item images go into a "Checklist items" subfolder inside it, created automatically.
translations.Choose which notifications you want to r: Choose which notifications you want to receive from this household.

translations.Pick the base folder where Pantry will s: Pick the base folder where Pantry will store uploaded images for this house. Checklist item images go into a "Checklist items" subfolder inside it, created automatically.
translations.Type to search for an account: Type to search for an account
translations.Deleting a house permanently removes all: Deleting a house permanently removes all of its lists, items, and membership records. This cannot be undone.
translations.All lists, items and member records for: All lists, items and member records for this house will be permanently deleted.

translations.The next occurrence is counted from the: The next occurrence is counted from the moment you tick the item off, so it always comes back a full interval after it was completed.
translations.The schedule is fixed: the item reappear: The schedule is fixed: the item reappears on its next scheduled occurrence, regardless of when you tick it off.
translations.Leave empty to repeat on the same day ea: Leave empty to repeat on the same day each month.
translations.Count interval from when the item is tic: Count interval from when the item is ticked off
